title: Humboltia glanduligera

intro: Humboldtia glanduligera is a species of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae, native to Southeast Asia. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities that may help alleviate symptoms of fever, sore throat, and respiratory issues. The bioactive constituents of Humboldtia glanduligera include flavonoids, alkaloids, and saponins, which are thought to contribute to its medicinal properties.
